questions.questionText: お盆の帰省ラッシュで道路は<u>渋滞</u>し、徐行運転が続いた。
questions.explanation: The word 渋滞 (traffic jam) is read as じゅうたい.

questions.questionText: このところ残業続きで疲れていたので、昨日の休日は___寝て過ごした。
questions.explanation: ひたすら means "nothing but" or "intently". The sentence means "I was tired from continuous overtime lately, so on yesterday's day off I did nothing but sleep."

questions.questionText: 私はあの方を尊敬して___。
questions.explanation: 〜てやまない is an N1 grammar point expressing a strong and continuous feeling, such as deep respect (尊敬してやみません).
